failure.message: Test method Tests.Tests.b) Maximum Zufallstest threw exception: System.Exception: Falsifiable, after 4 tests (11 shrinks) (StdGen (426705260, 297422865)): Original: 186N 121N 206N Shrunk: 121N 0N 122N with exception: Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.AssertFailedException: Assert.AreEqual failed.
